prompt: A vibrant, high-contrast Y2K fashion photography shot of two young East Asian adults. In the foreground, a young woman smiles softly at the camera, wearing a {argument name="female headwear" default="fuzzy pink bucket hat"}, a pastel patchwork crop top, a white pleated mini skirt, and a beaded necklace, while holding a white smartphone. Her long dark hair is blowing slightly. Behind her to the right, a young man laughs excitedly with his mouth open, wearing a {argument name="male headwear" default="backward orange baseball cap"}, a bright blue windbreaker over a green t-shirt, light khaki pants, and a silver chain. He is holding two black smartphones, one in each hand, with one raised high in the air. The image features bright flash lighting, a slight wide-angle lens distortion, and a smooth gradient background transitioning from {argument name="background color" default="hot pink"} to white.
translatedPrompt: 一张充满活力、高对比度的 Y2K 时尚摄影作品，主角为两位年轻的东亚成年人。前景中，一位年轻女性对着镜头温柔微笑，头戴 {argument name="female headwear" default="毛绒粉色渔夫帽"}，身穿柔和色调的拼接短款上衣、白色百褶短裙，并佩戴串珠项链，手中拿着一部白色智能手机。她的一头深色长发随风轻拂。在她右后方，一位年轻男性正兴奋地大笑，嘴巴微张，头戴 {argument name="male headwear" default="反戴橙色棒球帽"}，身穿绿色 T 恤外搭亮蓝色防风外套，下身穿着浅卡其色长裤，并佩戴银色链条。他双手各持一部黑色智能手机，其中一只手高高举起。画面采用明亮的闪光灯照明，带有轻微的广角镜头畸变，背景为从 {argument name="background color" default="亮粉色"} 过渡到白色的平滑渐变。

breakdown.creativeCore: Y2K 复古科技风青年肖像：生成一张充满活力的广角时尚肖像，展现两位手持智能手机的年轻人，呈现怀旧的 Y2K 美学风格。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 怀旧照片、纪实场景、人物生活方式、品牌氛围图

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 摄影/真实场景 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[媒介/渲染方式/审美方向/色彩系统]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: lens, camera]。

Text requirements:
[是否含文字/精确文字/可读性要求]。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
